metadata.story_title: Add Telemetry for Hook Performance Metrics
metadata.author: .claude/opus

what_worked_well.observation: TDD workflow adherence - Clear Red → Green → Refactor phases with 30 tests generated before implementation
what_worked_well.evidence: devforgeai/tests/STORY-200/ contains 7 test files with 30 total assertions

what_worked_well.observation: Test fixture design - Well-structured sample logs with predictable data enabled reliable assertions
Code organization - Utility functions follow DRY principle with clear section headers
what_worked_well.evidence: hook-telemetry.sh:30-74 extracts count_matches, count_data_lines, calculate_percentage, get_integer_part

what_worked_well.observation: Documentation quality - Comprehensive script header with usage, parameters, and exit codes
Security posture - Proper variable quoting, no eval usage, read-only operations
what_worked_well.evidence: Security audit: LOW risk, all OWASP checks passed

what_worked_well.observation: Parallel validator pattern - Running code-reviewer, security-auditor, test-automator in parallel
what_worked_well.evidence: QA Phase 2 executed 3 Task() calls in single message
what_worked_well.impact: Reduced QA time while maintaining thoroughness

areas_for_improvement.issue: Edge case testing gap in Red phase
areas_for_improvement.description: Empty log file bug (duplicate '0\n0' output causing integer comparison failure) not caught during Phase 02 test generation
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: test-automator subagent prompt lacks explicit edge case checklist for file-based scripts
areas_for_improvement.impact: Bug discovered during QA instead of development, requiring potential rework

areas_for_improvement.description: Pattern $(command || echo fallback) captures both stdout AND fallback when command fails with output
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Undocumented shell scripting anti-pattern in anti-patterns.md
areas_for_improvement.impact: Integer comparison failure on multiline variable

areas_for_improvement.description: 3 tests in test-hook-telemetry.sh fail due to overly strict regex patterns that don't match valid output
areas_for_improvement.evidence: test-hook-telemetry.sh Tests 7.1, 7.2, 8.1 fail with valid output
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Test assertions not validated against actual output format before finalization
areas_for_improvement.impact: False negative test failures (tests fail despite correct implementation)

recommendations.title: Add edge case checklist to test-automator subagent
recommendations.description: Add explicit edge case checklist for file-based scripts to test-automator system prompt
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add section '## Edge Case Checklist (File Operations)' with items: empty file (0 bytes), whitespace/comment-only file, missing file, very large file (boundary), special characters

recommendations.title: Document shell OR-fallback anti-pattern in anti-patterns.md
recommendations.description: Add Category 11: Shell Output Capture (SEVERITY: MEDIUM) documenting wrong vs correct patterns
recommendations.implementation_notes: Wrong: count=$(grep -c pattern file || echo "0"). Correct: count=$(grep -c pattern file) || count=0. Rationale: Wrong pattern captures both grep's stdout AND fallback when grep exits non-zero.

recommendations.title: Add test assertion validation step to QA Phase 1
recommendations.description: Run each test against sample output to verify regex patterns match expected format before proceeding
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add Step 1.3: Test Assertion Validation - flag tests with regex mismatch as MEDIUM violations

recommendations.title: Add ShellCheck integration for bash scripts in QA workflow
recommendations.description: Run shellcheck on .sh files during QA Phase 2 to catch shell scripting anti-patterns early

anti_patterns_detected.description: Regex patterns don't match valid output format

constraint_analysis.overall_assessment: Context files effective but gap identified in anti-patterns.md coverage for shell scripting patterns

rca_assessment.rationale: Issues are minor edge cases (common shell scripting mistake) and test authoring issues, not systemic framework breakdown

follow_up_stories.title: Fix empty log edge case in hook-telemetry.sh
Add shell scripting anti-patterns to anti-patterns.md
Add edge case checklist to test-automator subagent
Add ShellCheck integration to QA workflow
